# What Grade Do I Need? (Grade Calculator)

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000426993

The **What Grade Do I Need?** calculator helps you figure out what score you need on an upcoming assignment to hit a target overall grade for a class.

## How to Open the Calculator

  1. Open [**Grades**](https://app.heliumedu.com/grades)
  2. Tap the **What Grade Do I Need?** icon (calculator), to the right of the "Grade Trend" header
  3. If you have multiple eligible courses, a list will appear—select the class you want to calculate for

The calculator icon only appears when at least one of your classes has a category that meets the requirements below.

## Requirements

The calculator works for a category when:

  * The category has a **Weight (%)** set (weighted grading must be configured)
  * The category has **exactly one remaining ungraded assignment**

If a category does not meet these requirements, it will not be shown in the dropdown. See [Setting Up Weighted Grading & Assignment Categories](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418670) if weighted grading is not yet configured for your class.

## Using the Calculator

  1. The calculator shows your current overall grade for the class
  2. Select the **target category** (the category containing the one remaining ungraded item)
  3. Enter your **desired overall grade**
  4. Tap **Calculate**

The result will tell you one of the following:

  * **You need X% or higher** on that category to achieve your desired grade — aim for that score
  * **You're already above your target** — your current grade already meets or exceeds what you entered
  * **Score is unachievable** — the needed score exceeds 100%; you may need to adjust your target

## Related Articles

  * [How Helium Calculates Your Grades](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418648)
  * [Setting Up Weighted Grading & Assignment Categories](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418670)

---

## Helium Classic

The grade calculator is not available in Helium Classic.

_Helium Classic will remain available through at least Summer 2026._
